personalInfo.name: Mohamed Boumeroine
personalInfo.title: Senior R&D Engineer
personalInfo.subtitle: Angular | Spring Boot | Microservices
personalInfo.bio: Senior R&D Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing and building enterprise-grade applications. I specialize in Angular micro-frontends and Spring Boot microservices, delivering scalable solutions for government and HR platforms. Passionate about clean architecture, DevOps automation, and turning complex business requirements into robust, maintainable software.

projects.title: BL-WERH — HR Management Platform
projects.description: Enterprise HR solution for French municipalities, managing employee records, contracts, careers, and payroll cycles.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive HR management platform for French municipalities at Berger-Levrault. Built backend microservices with Java 17 and Spring Boot for managing employee records, contracts, career paths, and the full payroll cycle.

detail.overview: Comprehensive HR management platform built for French municipalities at Berger-Levrault. Handles the entire employee lifecycle — from onboarding and career tracking to payroll processing and document generation — using a microservices architecture.
features: Employee record management — profiles, contracts, and career tracking
Full payroll cycle management and tracking via dedicated micro-frontend
PDF pay slip generation, viewing, and download through API-Edition service
Asynchronous inter-service communication via Kafka (bl-exchange)
Database versioning with Liquibase across microservices
RESTful API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger
role: Built backend microservices with Java 17 & Spring Boot for HR domain logic
Designed and implemented Angular micro-frontends for employee profiles and payroll
Created the API-Edition service for PDF pay slip generation using JasperReports
Implemented Kafka-based event sync between HR microservices
Managed database schema versioning with Liquibase
Documented all service APIs with OpenAPI specifications
challenges: Reliable event sync across HR microservices → Kafka messaging (bl-exchange) for async communication
Complex payroll document generation at scale → Dedicated API-Edition service with JasperReports
Schema evolution across multiple services → Liquibase for version-controlled migrations

projects.title: BL-HubTyt — E-Government Hub
projects.description: Multi-tenant electronic administration hub built on microservices and micro-frontend architecture with full CI/CD pipeline.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a multi-tenant HUB for electronic administration at Berger-Levrault, built on a microservices and micro-frontend architecture with industrialization and multi-tenant capabilities.

detail.overview: Multi-tenant electronic administration HUB at Berger-Levrault. Built on microservices and micro-frontend architecture with full industrialization, CI/CD pipelines, and comprehensive monitoring.
features: API Gateway for centralized API management and security
Multi-tenant architecture supporting multiple municipalities
Spring Cloud Load Balancer for service discovery and routing
Keycloak-based authentication and authorization
Redis caching layer for performance optimization
RabbitMQ message broker for inter-service communication
Comprehensive monitoring with Grafana & Prometheus
role: Designed multi-tenant HUB architecture with microservices & micro-frontends
Implemented API Gateway for centralized API management
Set up infrastructure: Spring Cloud, Keycloak, Redis, Gitea
Integrated RabbitMQ for inter-service messaging
Improved code coverage with unit tests tracked via SonarQube
Built CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI/CD
challenges: Multi-tenant data isolation → Tenant-aware request routing and data partitioning
Service discovery in containerized environment → Spring Cloud Load Balancer
CI/CD pipeline for microservices ecosystem → GitLab CI/CD with Docker

projects.title: BL-ATM — Automated Test Manager
projects.description: Katalon Studio plugin for synchronizing Gherkin scenarios between Jira and Katalon, enabling full E2E test automation.
projects.longDescription: Developed a JAR plugin for Katalon Studio that synchronizes Gherkin scenarios from Jira tickets and imports them directly into Katalon, enabling complete end-to-end test automation.

detail.overview: Katalon Studio plugin for automated test management at Berger-Levrault. Bridges the gap between Jira test cases and Katalon Studio for seamless E2E test automation with Gherkin scenarios.
features: Sync Gherkin scenarios from Jira directly into Katalon Studio
Edit Gherkin scenarios within Katalon with auto-sync back to Jira
Gherkin syntax validation and error reporting
Automatic matching of scenarios with existing test records
Direct scenario execution from Katalon Studio
Integration with Zephyr Scale and Zephyr API
role: Developed the JAR plugin from scratch for Katalon Studio
Built SWT-based UI for scenario management
Implemented Jira & Zephyr Scale API integrations
Created Gherkin parser and syntax validator
Enabled full E2E test automation workflow
challenges: Bidirectional sync between Jira and Katalon → Custom API integration with conflict resolution
Gherkin syntax validation in real-time → Built a dedicated parser with error highlighting
Plugin compatibility across Katalon versions → Modular architecture with version-agnostic APIs

projects.title: EcoLens — B2B CRM E-Commerce
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile CRM for an optical lens supplier, enabling B2B clients to browse catalogs, place orders, and track deliveries in real time.
projects.longDescription: End-of-studies project at Progiciel System. Designed and deployed a full B2B CRM e-commerce app for EcoLens, an optical lens supplier in Casablanca.

detail.overview: B2B mobile CRM e-commerce application built for EcoLens, an optical lens supplier in Casablanca. Enables opticians to browse personalized product catalogs, place orders with precise lens parameters, track deliveries in real time, and manage financial documents — all from a single cross-platform app.
features: Secure client authentication with role-based access
Product catalog with category filters (Bleu, Minerale, Essentielle, Accessoires)
Personalized pricing per client based on commercial agreements
Order placement with lens parameters (Cylindre, Sphere, Axe, Oeil)
Real-time order tracking with delivery status timeline
Financial document management — invoices, payments, and balance tracking
Promotions and news module for monthly deals
ERP integration for automated data synchronization
role: Designed the full application architecture (frontend, backend, deployment)
Built cross-platform mobile UI with Flutter for Android & iOS
Developed RESTful API backend with Laravel and MySQL
Implemented ERP data sync for products, pricing, and order status
Deployed on OVHCloud infrastructure with FTP server management
Managed project sprints with Jira under Agile/Scrum methodology
challenges: Personalized pricing per client → Dynamic price engine synced with ERP data
Complex lens parameter ordering (Cylindre, Sphere, Axe) → Custom order form with validation
Real-time delivery tracking → Status timeline with GPS-based driver tracking

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern responsive portfolio built with Angular and Tailwind CSS to showcase my projects, skills, and experience. Designed with a clean UI/UX to attract recruiters and highlight my technical profile.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a personal portfolio website from scratch using Angular 16, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features smooth route animations, dark mode with system preference detection, scroll-reveal animations via custom IntersectionObserver directives, and a fully data-driven architecture.

detail.overview: A clean, modern portfolio site designed to highlight my technical profile to recruiters. Built with Angular 16 using lazy-loaded feature modules, a custom design system via Tailwind CSS, and a fully responsive layout optimised for any device.
features: Lazy-loaded Angular feature modules for optimal initial load performance
Dark/light mode with localStorage persistence and system prefers-color-scheme fallback
Smooth route transition animations with Angular Animations (enter/leave coordination)
Scroll-reveal effects via a custom IntersectionObserver directive — no external library
Count-up animation directive triggered on viewport entry
Data-driven — all content served from a single portfolio.json file via DataService
Custom Lottie animation player wrapping lottie-web directly
Fully responsive layout — mobile, tablet, and desktop
Deployed on GitHub Pages via angular-cli-ghpages
role: Designed the full UI/UX from scratch with a recruiter-focused, distraction-free layout
Architected Angular 16 app with lazy-loaded feature modules and a reactive data layer
Built reusable directives for scroll-reveal and count-up viewport animations
Configured Tailwind CSS with a custom design system — colors, typography, keyframe animations
Set up GitHub Pages deployment pipeline
challenges: Smooth route transitions without flickering → Angular Animations with coordinated enter/leave queries and cubic-bezier easing
Scroll-animation performance → Custom IntersectionObserver directives run outside Angular zone with throttled scroll events
Consistent design system → Tailwind config extended with primary, accent, and surface palettes and custom keyframes
